name: ralph-loop
description: Drives Copilot Agent Mode in a deterministic loop from PRD tasks.

ralph-loop.prdPath.description: Path to the PRD file (relative to workspace root).

ralph-loop.progressPath.description: Path to the progress tracking file.

ralph-loop.maxIterations.description: Maximum number of loop iterations (0 = unlimited).

ralph-loop.cooldownShowDialog.description: Show an auto-accepting dialog during inter-task countdown with Pause/Stop/Edit buttons.

ralph-loop.autoCloseEditors.description: Close all editor tabs after each task completes and is committed. Ensures the next task starts with a clean editor.

ralph-loop.inactivityTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before moving to next task.

ralph-loop.promptTemplate.description: Custom prompt template with {{variable}} placeholders. Variables: task, prd, progress, learnings, workspace, taskId, iterationNumber. Built-in ROLE & BEHAVIOR, TDD GATE, and safety sections are always prepended.

ralph-loop.preset.description: Workflow preset that applies smart defaults for common scenarios. Presets set config values that can still be overridden individually.

ralph-loop.featureBranch.enabled.description: Enable automatic feature branch creation and enforcement.

ralph-loop.preFlightWizard.description: Show pre-flight configuration wizard on loop start. 'always' shows full wizard, 'countdown' auto-starts with defaults after timeout, 'never' skips wizard entirely.

ralph-loop.preFlightCountdownSeconds.description: Seconds before auto-starting with defaults when preFlightWizard is 'countdown'.

ralph-loop.checkpointQuestions.description: Show structured questions at checkpoints, stagnation recovery, and session end via askQuestions. When false, uses simple notifications.

ralph-loop.hybridVerification.enabled.description: After each successful task commit, create a lock file and wait for an external verifier or human to remove it before continuing.

ralph-loop.hybridVerification.lockFilePa.description: Workspace-relative path for the external hybrid verification lock file.

ralph-loop.hybridVerification.pollInterv.description: How often Ralph checks whether the external hybrid verification lock file has been removed.
